blog.title: Top 10 Hackathon Mistakes Students Make
blog.desc: Avoid these common mistakes to improve your chances of success in hackathons.
blog.content:
Many teams fail not because of lack of skill, but because of avoidable mistakes.

Common Mistakes

  • Choosing overly complex ideas
  • Poor time management
  • Lack of teamwork
  • Ignoring UI/UX
  • Weak presentation

Focus on clarity, teamwork, and execution to stand out.

blog.title: How to Win Your First Hackathon: A Beginner’s Guide
blog.desc: A step-by-step guide to help beginners confidently participate and win their first hackathon.
blog.content:
Hackathons are one of the best ways to learn, build, and grow as a developer. If you're participating for the first time, it might feel overwhelming—but with the right approach, you can stand out.

Start with the Right Mindset

Focus on learning and building, not just winning. A strong mindset leads to better execution.

Choose a Simple but Impactful Idea

Pick a real-world problem and build a practical solution instead of overcomplicating.

Build an MVP

Create a minimum viable product that clearly demonstrates your idea.

Practice Your Pitch

Your presentation matters as much as your project. Be clear, confident, and structured.

Tip: Execution beats complexity every time.
